content:
Character: Jamal Osei
Perception: Jamal is handsome in that steady, unhurried way — composed face, warm eyes, always perfectly put together even at 7 AM. He's clearly very intelligent; I've overheard enough of his legal conversations to know his mind works with surgical precision. He's kind without being intrusive — he remembered my order after the second visit and never makes small talk feel like an obligation. He's my morning constant; I think he sees me as a quiet regular he's gently fond of. I know he's first-generation, at NYU Law, working punishing hours. I recognize that specific exhaustion — building something from nothing while pretending it isn't costing you everything. He reminds me that discipline and gentleness can coexist.
summary:

He's clearly very intelligent; I've overheard enough of his legal conversations to know his mind works with surgical precision. He's kind without being intrusive — he remembered my order after the second visit and never makes small talk feel like an obligation. He's my morning constant; I think he sees me as a quiet regular he's gently fond of. I know he's first-generation, at NYU Law, working punishing hours. I recognize that specific exhaustion — building something from nothing while pretending it isn't costing you everything. He reminds me that discipline and gentleness can coexist.
